title: Unit test: happy path
go_no_go_summary: Claude rated the S19 engineering deliverable complete and correct, but reported closeout NO-GO because the five evidence artifacts did not exist yet. The one P0 closeout finding is resolved by this evidence set and final RP00 control-plane validation. The P2 fixture exact-equality execution risk is resolved by local validator execution. The P3 wording note is informational.

findings.title: S19 production_ready evidence absent before closeout
findings.summary: Claude noted that contracts/control-plane-contract.json already marked S19 production_ready while docs/goal-closeout/rp00-p02-m03-s19 did not yet contain packet, command evidence, Claude review result, adjudication, and construction inspection.
findings.resolution: Added the S19 closeout evidence set under docs/goal-closeout/rp00-p02-m03-s19 and reran RP00 control-plane validation.

findings.title: Fixture exact-equality not empirically run by Claude
findings.summary: Claude statically confirmed fixture parity but could not execute the validator because Bash was disallowed by the read-only review constraint.
findings.resolution: Local validation executes scripts/validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs, whose S19 block enforces exact equality between control_plane_hermes_validation_unit_test_happy_path.golden_result and the S18 retry behavior fixture precheck_result.

findings.title: Contract wording says runtime work in a metadata-only handoff
findings.summary: Claude noted the phrase 'hands runtime work' is slightly awkward for a metadata-only S18 to S19 to S20 handoff.
findings.resolution: No behavior or gate impact. The wording is semantically consistent with the handoff chain and may be cleaned up with S20 or M03 closeout documentation if desired.

claude_cli.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools Read,Grep,Glob --disallowedTools Bash,Edit,Write,MultiEdit,NotebookEdit --output-format json

findings.title: S19 production_ready evidence absent before closeout
findings.summary: S19 evidence files are required before production_ready.

findings.title: Fixture exact-equality not empirically run by Claude
findings.summary: The local validator enforces the exact fixture parity check.

findings.title: Contract wording
findings.summary: Optional wording cleanup; no semantic or validation issue.

required_followups: Continue with RP00.P02.M03.S20 Unit test: denied path as the next subphase.
review_notes: Claude confirmed the S19 policy, validator, module descriptor, fixture, README, service tests, contract definition, S18 dependency, S01-S18 golden chain, synthetic fixture integrity, no-write boundaries, M03 open state, and S20 successor behavior.
There were no P1 findings and no S19 implementation code defects.
parsed_review.summary: Claude reported implementation GO and closeout NO-GO due to missing evidence. Evidence and executable gates resolve the closeout blocker, so S19 is ready for final gate validation.

raw_claude_cli_result_summary.summary: Claude returned implementation GO and closeout NO-GO; P0/P2 closeout items are resolved by evidence creation and executable gates.
